title: dracaena australasica
intro: Dracaena australasica, also known as the Queensland umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The extracts from the plant's leaves have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions and respiratory issues. Dracaena australasica can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
